summary_one_line: Input must carry a Thai/Lao codepoint in 0x0E00-0x0EFF with klass==0 to enter the switch(u); baseline havoc reaches it, I2S fuzzers do not.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A glyph codepoint u satisfying (u & ~0xFF) == 0x0E00u (a Thai/Lao codepoint in 0x0E00-0x0EFF) with combining class klass==0 and < 200, so the inner if at line 44 holds and control reaches the switch(u) at line 46. No specific 4-byte magic literal need match a CMP operand; the gate is a range/mask test plus a per-glyph category, reached by raw bytes near 0x0E.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive and value_profile resolve 10/10 trials using plain havoc/token mutation. Their winning seeds are dense with 0x0e bytes (e.g. value_profile seed 053d0247... has runs '0e 0e 0e 0e' and naive seed 060872d3... has '0e' bytes) that decode into the 0x0E00-block codepoints needed to drive switch(u) and downstream the klass switch (lines 97/107/110/129 hit only by W).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog (resolved 1/10) and value_profile_cmplog (resolved 2/10) stay blocked because the switch operand u is a font-derived Unicode codepoint produced by a range/mask test, not a literal that appears as a logged CMP operand. I2SRandReplace/CMP_MAP have no useful operand to substitute or hill-climb toward, so the I2S stages spend execution budget without progressing this gate, while their havoc share is diluted.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner's enabling technique is plain havoc byte mutation (havoc-only): naive and value_profile lack any input-to-state substitution mutator entirely and reach the Thai-codepoint switch by stochastically producing 0x0E-block bytes. The comparison-solving stage in the losers gains no traction because the gate is a mask/range test on a derived codepoint, not a comparison whose operand can be copied from the per-execution CMP buffer.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is switch(u) at line 46, reached only after a Thai/Lao codepoint mask test and a klass==0 check.
Reaching the switch additionally requires klass==0.
The two decisive pairs both differ by the I2S technique, with the NON-I2S fuzzer as winner.
value_profile beats value_profile_cmplog at this branch, also a [delta: I2S] pair.
naive resolves all 10 trials and cmplog only 1, showing the baseline (non-I2S) fuzzer wins.
cmplog is the I2S loser, blocked in 9/10 trials.
Winning value_profile seed bytes are dense with 0x0e (the Thai-block high byte), supplying codepoints in the 0x0E00 range.
cmplog (an I2S fuzzer) is the storing fuzzer for the loser-blocking seeds that take the false branch.
cmplog's distinguishing mutator over naive is I2SRandReplace, which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets.
naive's mutator set is havoc + token with no I2S, the technique enabling the winner here.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile also lacks I2SRandReplace, so the value_profile winner cannot be an I2S find.
W explores downstream klass-switch arms (lines 97/107/110/129) that L never reaches, consistent with W feeding the switch real Thai codepoints.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: 97  T=5 F=79  T=0 F=46  case HB_MODIFIED_COMBINING_CLASS_CCC22: /* meteg */

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5619 --role W --fuzzer naive --trial 1 --seed 060872d3eb5bff14` and `--fuzzer value_profile --seed 053d0247691f7c01`. Both winning chains are 16 levels of pure havoc/token mutators (DwordInterestingMutator, CrossoverReplaceMutator, ByteNegMutator, etc.). Each reports one dash row at depth 15 (shared root ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6), but that root is common to both a naive and a value_profile chain; value_profile has NO I2SRandReplace mutator, so the dash row is a shared imported corpus-root artifact, not an I2S find by the winner. The winning mechanism is therefore havoc, not I2S; the dash signal is not I2S-exclusive across these provenances.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on switch(u) over a Thai-block codepoint in which cmplog/vpc resolve the branch faster than naive/value_profile — would show the gate is in fact I2S-solvable and I2S is not a net handicap here.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-level claim that 0x0e-dense winner seeds decode to in-range codepoints is inferred from raw bytes plus source mask test, not from a confirmed codepoint trace through the harness's UTF decoder.
